message:
fix: surface errors from ScanForArtifacts and checkDatabaseConfigValues (bd-4hn4)

ScanForArtifacts discarded filepath.Walk errors with '_ =', returning a
partial/empty report without indicating failure. Callers would report
"No classic artifacts detected" when the scan actually failed.

checkDatabaseConfigValues returned an empty issues slice when
dolt.NewFromConfigWithOptions failed, masking database corruption or
permission issues as "all config values valid".

Both now surface errors to callers instead of silently swallowing them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
